title: Mirror Image Internet: A Pioneer in Content Distribution Network Services
author: Aberdeen Group
abstract: Aberdeen Group profiles Mirror Image Internet, a CDN provider in Woburn MA, highlighting its Content Access Point architecture for centralized-yet-distributed content delivery. Two customer case studies (Fastclick and an international toy retailer) validate cost savings, performance gains, and responsive service. The profile examines Mirror Image's Smart Content platform for XML-based rules-driven adaptive content delivery.
importance_rationale: Solid vendor profile capturing CDN market consolidation from 40+ vendors to fewer than a dozen by 2004; provides useful snapshot of early enterprise CDN adoption patterns.
relevance_rationale: CDN architecture principles (edge caching, geotargeting, centralized control) remain foundational to modern CDN services like Cloudflare and Akamai, though specific vendor and technology details are dated.
prescience_rationale: Correctly anticipated that CDN usage would continue growing and that application delivery over CDNs would expand beyond static content; however Mirror Image itself was acquired and the Smart Content platform did not achieve widespread adoption.
